summary: Iteration 2 refactor + authz tightening verified. 44/44 pytest tests passing (33 regression from iter 1 + 11 new authz tests). Refactored server.py bootstrap loads all 4 routers (auth, transactions, store, orders) with no ImportError; startup indexes created and admin seeded. Verified authz: store role gets 403 on POST/PUT/DELETE /api/transactions and /api/sales-orders with 'Akun Store tidak berwenang...' message. Staff role can still write transactions and SO (200). Finance role still 403 on writes with 'Akun Finance hanya untuk view' message. Store role can POST + DELETE /api/deliveries (require_store_write). Staff role gets 403 on DELETE /api/deliveries.
critical_code_review_comments: Refactor is clean: server.py reduced from 1856 → 122 lines. Domain routers well-separated. deps.py role matrix is explicit and documented in module docstring.
require_write now correctly blocks both finance and store with role-specific 403 messages (good UX for debugging).
delete_delivery correctly uses require_store_write to match create permission (admin+store).
Minor: routers/store.py is still large (~650 lines). Could be split further (receipts vs issuances vs requests) in future iteration, but not blocking.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (added TestAuthZTransactions, TestAuthZSalesOrders, TestAuthZDeliveries classes — 11 new tests; strengthened finance 403 assertion to check message content)
test_credentials: admin/admin123, staff01/staff123, store01/store123, finance01/finance123 — all working
seed_data_creation: None — used existing seed_data. All TEST_-prefixed data cleaned up via cleanup fixtures.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactored into routers/. All tests in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (pytest, xdist parallel). Role matrix: admin=full, staff=purchasing writes (tx+SO), store=store ops + deliveries write, finance=read-only. New authz test classes verify the iteration-2 tightening. Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL exported.
rca of the issue: N/A — refactor verified, no regressions, new authz behavior working as designed.
